case_title: KOH, YOUNG FOON et al vs. PETERS, PATRICK et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOH, YOUNG FOON OH, SOO YONG AS TO DEFENDANT PETERS, PATRICK ALAMO RENT-A-CAR, INC. DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-01-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-14-1994

TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-06-1995 CONTINUED FROM FEB-02-1995 TO MAR-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
